system.description: This spell creates the illusion of an object, creature, or force, as visualized by the caster. Sound, smell, and thermal illusions are all within the spells power to create. Creatures who view the illusion believe it, and can suffer damage from illusions. Hit point damage is suffered from damage to the mind/psyche. While concentrating, the caster can move the image within the range. The image persists for 3 rounds after the caster ceases concentrating. The image disappears if an opponent makes the saving throw. The spell affects a 40 cubic foot area + 10 cubic feet per level.
